summary: The video shows a snowy road with poor visibility due to falling snowflakes. A red vehicle is seen ahead, moving slowly and emitting brake lights intermittently. Another vehicle passes by on the left side.

events_timeline.event: A red vehicle is traveling ahead on the snowy road, emitting brake lights intermittently.
Another vehicle passes by on the left side of the road.

uncertainties: Visibility of falling snowflakes impacting the clarity of the footage.

risk_assessment.why: Poor visibility due to snowfall may lead to reduced traction and increased braking distances, posing a potential risk for accidents.
